# Web-profesional
rizhani.technology
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>PT Rizhani Technology Solution — Your Digital Partner</title>
  <meta name="description" content="PT Rizhani Technology Solution — Solusi IT Profesional: Networking, Security System, Maintenance & IT Consulting untuk bisnis Anda.">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 40 40'><polygon points='20,2 37,11.5 37,28.5 20,38 3,28.5 3,11.5' fill='%230ea5e9'/><text x='50%' y='57%' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='middle' font-family='Poppins,sans-serif' font-weight='900' font-size='15' fill='%23ffffff'>R</text></svg>">
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 40 40'><polygon points='20,2 37,11.5 37,28.5 20,38 3,28.5 3,11.5' fill='%230ea5e9'/><text x='50%' y='57%' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='middle' font-family='Poppins,sans-serif' font-weight='900' font-size='15' fill='%23ffffff'>R</text></svg>">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
  <!-- Optional external logo file (place logos.png in project root or assets/) -->
  <link rel="icon" href="logos.png">
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="logos.png">
  <meta name="msapplication-TileImage" content="logos.png">
</head>
<body>

  <!-- LOADING SCREEN -->
  <div id="loader">
    <div class="loader-inner">
      <div class="loader-rings">
        <div class="lr lr1"></div>
        <div class="lr lr2"></div>
        <div class="lr lr3"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="loader-logo-text">RTS</div>
      <div class="loader-label">INITIALIZING SYSTEM...</div>
      <div class="loader-bar-wrap"><div class="loader-bar" id="loadBar"></div></div>
      <div class="loader-pct" id="loadPct">0%</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SCROLL PROGRESS BAR -->
  <div id="scrollBar"></div>

  <!-- CURSOR GLOW -->
  <div id="cursor"></div>
  <div id="cursorTrail"></div>

  <!-- ══════════ NAVBAR ══════════ -->
  <nav id="navbar">
    <div class="nav-wrap">
      <a href="#hero" class="nav-brand">
        <img src="logos.png" alt="Rizhani logo" class="nb-img" width="38" height="38">
       
        <div class="nb-text">
          <span class="nbt-main">RIZHANI</span>
          <span class="nbt-sub">TECHNOLOGY SOLUTION</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <div class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
        <a href="#hero"         class="nl active">Home</a>
        <a href="#about"        class="nl">About</a>
        <a href="#services"     class="nl">Services</a>
        <a href="#portfolio"    class="nl">Portfolio</a>
        <a href="#testimonials" class="nl">Reviews</a>
        <a href="#contact"      class="nl">Contact</a>
        <a href="https://wa.me/628128309984" target="_blank" class="nl-cta">
          Get Started
          <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        </a>
      </div>

      <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" aria-label="Toggle menu">
        <span></span><span></span><span></span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       HERO
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="hero">
    <!-- Animated canvas background (replaces video) -->
    <canvas id="heroCanvas"></canvas>

    <!-- Optional: replace canvas with real video by un-commenting below
    <video id="heroBg" autoplay muted loop playsinline poster="assets/hero-poster.jpg">
      <source src="assets/tech-bg.mp4" type="video/mp4">
    </video>
    -->

    <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
    <div class="hero-grid"></div>

    <div class="hero-body">
      <div class="hero-left reveal">
        <div class="hero-badge">
          <span class="hb-pulse"></span>
          DIGITAL SOLUTION PARTNER
        </div>

        <h1 class="hero-h1">
          <span class="hh-white">Elevate Your Business</span>
          <span class="hh-grad">With Smart Technology</span>
        </h1>

        <p class="hero-p">
          PT Rizhani Technology Solution menghadirkan layanan IT profesional
          — networking, security system, maintenance, dan IT consulting —
          untuk mendorong pertumbuhan bisnis Anda di era digital.
        </p>

        <div class="hero-mini-stats">
          <div class="hms-item"><span class="hms-n">150+</span><span class="hms-l">Clients</span></div>
          <div class="hms-sep"></div>
          <div class="hms-item"><span class="hms-n">500+</span><span class="hms-l">Projects</span></div>
          <div class="hms-sep"></div>
          <div class="hms-item"><span class="hms-n">4+</span><span class="hms-l">Years</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-btns">
          <a href="#services" class="btn-primary">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M13 2L3 14h9l-1 8 10-12h-9l1-8z"/></svg>
            Explore Services
          </a>
          <a href="#contact" class="btn-ghost">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 013.07 9.81 19.79 19.79 0 01.18 1.18 2 2 0 012.18 0h3a2 2 0 012 1.72 12.84 12.84 0 00.7 2.81 2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L6.91 7.91a16 16 0 006.16 6.16l1.52-1.52a2 2 0 012.11-.45 12.84 12.84 0 002.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg>
            Contact Us
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-right reveal-right">
        <div class="hero-viz">
          <div class="hz-ring hz-ring-1"></div>
          <div class="hz-ring hz-ring-2"></div>
          <div class="hz-ring hz-ring-3"></div>
          <div class="hz-core">
            <div class="hz-logo" aria-hidden="true" title="Rizhani">
              <img src="logos.png" alt="Rizhani" class="hz-logo-img">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="hz-card hzc-1"><div class="hzc-icon">🌐</div><span>Networking</span></div>
          <div class="hz-card hzc-2"><div class="hzc-icon">🛡️</div><span>Security</span></div>
          <div class="hz-card hzc-3"><div class="hzc-icon">⚙️</div><span>Maintenance</span></div>
          <div class="hz-card hzc-4"><div class="hzc-icon">💡</div><span>Consulting</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="scroll-hint">
      <div class="sh-mouse"><div class="sh-wheel"></div></div>
      <span>Scroll</span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════ TRUSTED BY ══════════ -->
  <section id="trusted">
    <div class="container">
      <p class="trusted-label reveal">Dipercaya oleh perusahaan-perusahaan terkemuka Indonesia</p>
      <div class="trusted-logos reveal" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:32px;">

        <!-- O!save -->
        <div class="tl-item" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="O!save" style="height:48px;object-fit:contain;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;opacity:0.6;">O!save</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Daya Toyota -->
        <div class="tl-item" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Daya Toyota" style="height:48px;object-fit:contain;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;opacity:0.6;">Daya Toyota</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Daya Daihatsu -->
        <div class="tl-item" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Daya Daihatsu" style="height:48px;object-fit:contain;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;opacity:0.6;">Daya Daihatsu</span>
        </div>

        <!-- FIF Group -->
        <div class="tl-item" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="FIF Group" style="height:48px;object-fit:contain;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;opacity:0.6;">FIF Group</span>
        </div>

        <!-- PT Djojo Negoro -->
        <div class="tl-item" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="PT Djojo Negoro" style="height:48px;object-fit:contain;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;opacity:0.6;">PT Djojo Negoro</span>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       ABOUT
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="about">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-hd reveal">
        <div class="sh-tag">About Us</div>
        <h2>Solusi IT <span class="text-grad">Terpercaya</span> untuk Bisnis Anda</h2>
        <p>Mitra teknologi yang berkomitmen menghadirkan layanan IT terbaik dengan standar internasional.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="about-grid">
        <!-- Left: text & tabs -->
        <div class="about-left reveal">
          <div class="ab-tabs">
            <button class="abt active" data-tab="profil">Profil</button>
            <button class="abt" data-tab="visi">Visi</button>
            <button class="abt" data-tab="misi">Misi</button>
          </div>

          <div class="abt-panel active" id="tab-profil">
            <p>PT Rizhani Technology Solution adalah perusahaan teknologi informasi yang hadir dengan misi menyediakan solusi IT komprehensif bagi dunia bisnis Indonesia. Dengan pengalaman lebih dari 4 tahun, kami telah melayani 150+ klien dari berbagai sektor industri — mulai dari ritel, manufaktur, hingga lembaga keuangan.</p>
            <p style="margin-top:1rem">Kami memiliki tim profesional bersertifikasi yang berdedikasi menghadirkan solusi terbaik mulai dari infrastruktur jaringan, sistem keamanan, hingga consulting strategis. Kepercayaan klien adalah prioritas utama kami.</p>
            <div class="about-pillars">
              <div class="ap-item"><div class="ap-icon">👨‍💼</div><div><strong>Profesional</strong><span>Tim ahli bersertifikasi</span></div></div>
              <div class="ap-item"><div class="ap-icon">🛡️</div><div><strong>Terpercaya</strong><span>Garansi kepuasan klien</span></div></div>
              <div class="ap-item"><div class="ap-icon">⚡</div><div><strong>Responsif</strong><span>Support 24/7</span></div></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="abt-panel" id="tab-visi">
            <div class="visi-box">
              <div class="vb-icon">🎯</div>
              <h3>Visi Kami</h3>
              <p>Menjadi mitra teknologi informasi terpercaya dan terdepan yang membantu bisnis Indonesia bertransformasi digital secara menyeluruh, efisien, dan berkelanjutan — sehingga setiap perusahaan dapat bersaing di tingkat global melalui teknologi yang tepat dan inovatif.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="abt-panel" id="tab-misi">
            <div class="misi-list">
              <div class="ml-row"><span class="ml-n">01</span><div><strong>Kualitas Premium</strong><p>Memberikan solusi IT berkualitas tinggi dengan standar internasional di setiap proyek yang kami kerjakan.</p></div></div>
              <div class="ml-row"><span class="ml-n">02</span><div><strong>Tim Profesional</strong><p>Membangun tim yang terlatih, bersertifikasi, dan berpengalaman di bidangnya masing-masing.</p></div></div>
              <div class="ml-row"><span class="ml-n">03</span><div><strong>Inovasi Teknologi</strong><p>Menghadirkan inovasi teknologi terkini yang tepat sasaran sesuai kebutuhan bisnis klien.</p></div></div>
              <div class="ml-row"><span class="ml-n">04</span><div><strong>Kemitraan Jangka Panjang</strong><p>Mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis klien melalui hubungan kemitraan strategis yang berkelanjutan.</p></div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right: timeline -->
        <div class="timeline reveal-right">
          <div class="tl-head">Our Journey</div>
          <div class="tl-items">
            <div class="tl-row"><div class="tl-yr">2022</div><div class="tl-line"><div class="tl-dot"></div></div><div class="tl-desc">PT Rizhani Technology Solution berdiri di Bekasi sebagai startup IT profesional.</div></div>
            <div class="tl-row"><div class="tl-yr">2022</div><div class="tl-line"><div class="tl-dot"></div></div><div class="tl-desc">Melayani klien korporat pertama dan membangun reputasi layanan jaringan.</div></div>
            <div class="tl-row"><div class="tl-yr">2023</div><div class="tl-line"><div class="tl-dot"></div></div><div class="tl-desc">Partnership resmi dengan vendor Cisco, Mikrotik & Ubiquiti Networks.</div></div>
            <div class="tl-row"><div class="tl-yr">2023</div><div class="tl-line"><div class="tl-dot"></div></div><div class="tl-desc">Bergabung sebagai mitra teknologi FIF Group — member of ASTRA.</div></div>
            <div class="tl-row"><div class="tl-yr">2024</div><div class="tl-line"><div class="tl-dot"></div></div><div class="tl-desc">Launch layanan remote support & real-time monitoring 24/7.</div></div>
            <div class="tl-row"><div class="tl-yr">2024</div><div class="tl-line"><div class="tl-dot last"></div></div><div class="tl-desc">🏆 Pencapaian 500+ proyek sukses dan 150+ klien aktif terlayani.</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       SERVICES
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="services">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-hd reveal">
        <div class="sh-tag">Our Services</div>
        <h2>Layanan <span class="text-grad">Unggulan</span> Kami</h2>
        <p>Solusi teknologi komprehensif yang dirancang khusus untuk kebutuhan bisnis Anda.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="services-grid">

        <div class="svc-card reveal">
          <div class="svc-num">01</div>
          <div class="svc-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" width="36" height="36">
              <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="19" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
              <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
              <path d="M5 24h38M24 5v38" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
              <ellipse cx="24" cy="24" rx="9" ry="19" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3>Networking</h3>
          <p>Infrastruktur jaringan enterprise yang stabil, aman, dan terukur untuk mendukung operasional bisnis Anda secara optimal.</p>
          <ul class="svc-list">
            <li>Instalasi LAN & WiFi Enterprise</li>
            <li>Setting Router & Managed Switch</li>
            <li>Firewall & Network Security</li>
            <li>Multi-Site & Inter-Branch Network</li>
            <li>Bandwidth Management</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="#contact" class="svc-cta">Konsultasi Gratis →</a>
        </div>

        <div class="svc-card reveal" style="animation-delay:.1s">
          <div class="svc-num">02</div>
          <div class="svc-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" width="36" height="36">
              <path d="M24 4L4 14v10c0 11 8.4 21.3 20 24 11.6-2.7 20-13 20-24V14L24 4z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
              <path d="M16 24l6 6 10-10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3>Security System</h3>
          <p>Sistem keamanan terintegrasi yang melindungi aset, data, dan operasional bisnis Anda dari ancaman fisik maupun digital.</p>
          <ul class="svc-list">
            <li>CCTV IP Camera & Analog HD</li>
            <li>Access Control System</li>
            <li>Alarm & Intrusion Detection</li>
            <li>AI-Powered Video Analytics</li>
            <li>Remote Monitoring 24/7</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="#contact" class="svc-cta">Konsultasi Gratis →</a>
        </div>

        <div class="svc-card reveal" style="animation-delay:.2s">
          <div class="svc-num">03</div>
          <div class="svc-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" width="36" height="36">
              <rect x="6" y="10" width="36" height="28" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
              <path d="M6 18h36" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
              <circle cx="12" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
              <circle cx="18" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
              <path d="M14 30h20M14 34h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3>IT Maintenance</h3>
          <p>Perawatan dan dukungan teknis proaktif untuk menjaga sistem IT Anda berjalan optimal tanpa gangguan sepanjang waktu.</p>
          <ul class="svc-list">
            <li>Maintenance PC, Laptop & Server</li>
            <li>Preventive & Corrective Care</li>
            <li>Troubleshooting & Helpdesk</li>
            <li>Security Patch & Software Update</li>
            <li>SLA-Based Support Contract</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="#contact" class="svc-cta">Konsultasi Gratis →</a>
        </div>

        <div class="svc-card reveal" style="animation-delay:.3s">
          <div class="svc-num">04</div>
          <div class="svc-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" width="36" height="36">
              <circle cx="24" cy="18" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
              <path d="M8 40c0-8.8 7.2-16 16-16s16 7.2 16 16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
              <path d="M24 8v4M24 24v4M14.3 11.3l2.8 2.8M30.9 27.1l2.8 2.8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3>IT Consulting</h3>
          <p>Konsultasi strategis dari para ahli IT berpengalaman untuk membantu Anda mengambil keputusan teknologi yang tepat dan terarah.</p>
          <ul class="svc-list">
            <li>IT Infrastructure Assessment</li>
            <li>Digital Transformation Roadmap</li>
            <li>Technology Selection & Planning</li>
            <li>Cloud Migration Strategy</li>
            <li>IT Governance & Compliance</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="#contact" class="svc-cta">Konsultasi Gratis →</a>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       TECHNOLOGY STACK
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="techstack">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-hd reveal">
        <div class="sh-tag">Technology</div>
        <h2>Teknologi yang Kami <span class="text-grad">Gunakan</span></h2>
        <p>Bermitra dengan merek-merek teknologi terkemuka untuk solusi terbaik.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="tech-cats reveal">
        <div class="tc-col">
          <div class="tc-label">🔌 Networking</div>
          <div class="tc-items">
            <div class="tc-chip">🔧 Mikrotik</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🌐 Cisco</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">📡 Ubiquiti</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🔒 Fortinet</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tc-col">
          <div class="tc-label">📷 Security</div>
          <div class="tc-items">
            <div class="tc-chip">📹 Hikvision</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">📸 Dahua</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🔑 ZKTeco</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🎥 Axis</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tc-col">
          <div class="tc-label">🖥️ Infrastructure</div>
          <div class="tc-items">
            <div class="tc-chip">🪟 Windows Server</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🐧 Linux</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">⚡ VMware</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🐳 Docker</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tc-col">
          <div class="tc-label">☁️ Cloud</div>
          <div class="tc-items">
            <div class="tc-chip">☁️ AWS</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🌤️ Azure</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">🔵 Google Cloud</div>
            <div class="tc-chip">💾 Veeam</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       WORK PROCESS
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="process">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-hd reveal">
        <div class="sh-tag">How We Work</div>
        <h2>Alur Kerja <span class="text-grad">Profesional</span></h2>
        <p>Proses terstruktur dari konsultasi awal hingga dukungan berkelanjutan.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="process-wrap">
        <div class="proc-card reveal">
          <div class="proc-step">01</div>
          <div class="proc-icon">💬</div>
          <h3>Konsultasi</h3>
          <p>Analisa mendalam terhadap kebutuhan dan infrastruktur IT Anda untuk merumuskan solusi yang tepat sasaran.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="proc-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="proc-card reveal" style="animation-delay:.1s">
          <div class="proc-step">02</div>
          <div class="proc-icon">📐</div>
          <h3>Perancangan</h3>
          <p>Desain solusi komprehensif lengkap dengan dokumentasi teknis, timeline, dan estimasi anggaran yang transparan.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="proc-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="proc-card reveal" style="animation-delay:.2s">
          <div class="proc-step">03</div>
          <div class="proc-icon">🖥️</div>
          <h3>Implementasi</h3>
          <p>Pemasangan dan integrasi sistem oleh teknisi bersertifikasi dengan standar profesional yang ketat dan terukur.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="proc-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="proc-card reveal" style="animation-delay:.3s">
          <div class="proc-step">04</div>
          <div class="proc-icon">🛠️</div>
          <h3>Dukungan</h3>
          <p>Monitoring dan support berkelanjutan 24/7 untuk memastikan sistem berjalan optimal dan masalah teratasi cepat.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       PORTFOLIO
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="portfolio">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-hd reveal">
        <div class="sh-tag">Portfolio</div>
        <h2>Proyek <span class="text-grad">Unggulan</span> Kami</h2>
        <p>Beberapa proyek terbaik yang telah kami selesaikan untuk klien-klien terkemuka.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="pf-filter reveal">
        <button class="pf-btn active" data-filter="all">All Projects</button>
        <button class="pf-btn" data-filter="networking">Networking</button>
        <button class="pf-btn" data-filter="security">Security</button>
        <button class="pf-btn" data-filter="maintenance">Maintenance</button>
      </div>

      <div class="pf-grid" id="pfGrid">

        <div class="pf-item reveal" data-cat="networking">
          <div class="pfi-img pfi-1">
            <div class="pfi-overlay"><button class="pfi-btn" data-modal="m1">View Details</button></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pfi-info">
            <span class="pfi-tag networking">Networking</span>
            <h3>FIF Group Enterprise Network</h3>
            <p>Implementasi jaringan enterprise untuk 5 cabang FIF Group ASTRA di Jakarta.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pf-item reveal" data-cat="security" style="animation-delay:.1s">
          <div class="pfi-img pfi-2">
            <div class="pfi-overlay"><button class="pfi-btn" data-modal="m2">View Details</button></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pfi-info">
            <span class="pfi-tag security">Security</span>
            <h3>Daya Group CCTV & Access Control</h3>
            <p>Sistem CCTV IP 4K dan access control terintegrasi untuk warehouse Daya Group.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pf-item reveal" data-cat="networking" style="animation-delay:.2s">
          <div class="pfi-img pfi-3">
            <div class="pfi-overlay"><button class="pfi-btn" data-modal="m3">View Details</button></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pfi-info">
            <span class="pfi-tag networking">Networking</span>
            <h3>O!save Multi-Outlet WiFi Network</h3>
            <p>Setup jaringan WiFi enterprise untuk 12 outlet O!save di Jabodetabek.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pf-item reveal" data-cat="maintenance" style="animation-delay:.3s">
          <div class="pfi-img pfi-4">
            <div class="pfi-overlay"><button class="pfi-btn" data-modal="m4">View Details</button></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pfi-info">
            <span class="pfi-tag maintenance">Maintenance</span>
            <h3>PT Djojo Negoro Server Maintenance</h3>
            <p>Kontrak maintenance server dan IT infrastructure tahunan untuk PT Djojo Negoro.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pf-item reveal" data-cat="security" style="animation-delay:.1s">
          <div class="pfi-img pfi-5">
            <div class="pfi-overlay"><button class="pfi-btn" data-modal="m5">View Details</button></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pfi-info">
            <span class="pfi-tag security">Security</span>
            <h3>Corporate Office Security Upgrade</h3>
            <p>Modernisasi sistem keamanan gedung perkantoran dengan AI-powered surveillance.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pf-item reveal" data-cat="maintenance" style="animation-delay:.2s">
          <div class="pfi-img pfi-6">
            <div class="pfi-overlay"><button class="pfi-btn" data-modal="m6">View Details</button></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pfi-info">
            <span class="pfi-tag maintenance">IT Consulting</span>
            <h3>Digital Transformation Roadmap</h3>
            <p>Penyusunan roadmap transformasi digital dan strategi migrasi cloud untuk klien manufaktur.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- PORTFOLIO MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-bg" id="modalBg">
    <div class="modal-box">
      <button class="modal-close" id="modalClose">✕</button>
      <div id="modalContent"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       STATISTICS
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="stats">
    <div class="stats-bg-anim"></div>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="stats-grid">
        <div class="stat-item reveal">
          <div class="stat-ico">👥</div>
          <div class="stat-row">
            <span class="stat-n" data-target="150">0</span>
            <span class="stat-suf">+</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-lbl">Klien Aktif</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item reveal" style="animation-delay:.1s">
          <div class="stat-ico">✅</div>
          <div class="stat-row">
            <span class="stat-n" data-target="500">0</span>
            <span class="stat-suf">+</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-lbl">Proyek Selesai</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item reveal" style="animation-delay:.2s">
          <div class="stat-ico">📅</div>
          <div class="stat-row">
            <span class="stat-n" data-target="8">0</span>
            <span class="stat-suf">+</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-lbl">Tahun Pengalaman</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item reveal" style="animation-delay:.3s">
          <div class="stat-ico">⭐</div>
          <div class="stat-row">
            <span class="stat-n" data-target="98">0</span>
            <span class="stat-suf">%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-lbl">Client Satisfaction</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       TESTIMONIALS
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="testimonials">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-hd reveal">
        <div class="sh-tag">Testimonials</div>
        <h2>Apa Kata <span class="text-grad">Klien</span> Kami?</h2>
        <p>Kepercayaan dan kepuasan klien adalah motivasi terbesar kami untuk terus berkembang.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="testi-wrap reveal">
        <div class="testi-slider" id="testiSlider">

          <div class="testi-slide">
            <div class="ts-stars">★★★★★</div>
            <p class="ts-text">"PT Rizhani Technology Solution telah membantu kami membangun infrastruktur jaringan yang sangat handal di seluruh cabang FIF Group. Tim mereka sangat profesional, cepat tanggap, dan selalu memberikan solusi terbaik. Kerja sama yang luar biasa dan highly recommended!"</p>
            <div class="ts-author">
              <div class="ts-ava">AF</div>
              <div><strong>Ahmad Fauzi</strong><span>IT Manager — FIF Group (ASTRA)</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="testi-slide">
            <div class="ts-stars">★★★★★</div>
            <p class="ts-text">"Layanan CCTV dan security system yang dipasang oleh Rizhani Technology sangat memuaskan. Kualitas gambar sangat jernih, sistem stabil tanpa downtime, dan tim support yang selalu siap 24 jam. Kami sangat puas dengan kerja sama ini!"</p>
            <div class="ts-author">
              <div class="ts-ava">SR</div>
              <div><strong>Sari Rahmawati</strong><span>Operations Head — Daya Group</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="testi-slide">
            <div class="ts-stars">★★★★★</div>
            <p class="ts-text">"Sejak menggunakan jasa Rizhani Technology untuk maintenance IT dan jaringan WiFi di semua outlet kami, gangguan teknis berkurang drastis. Response time mereka luar biasa cepat dan biaya sangat kompetitif. Mitra IT terbaik untuk bisnis kami."</p>
            <div class="ts-author">
              <div class="ts-ava">BS</div>
              <div><strong>Budi Santoso</strong><span>IT Administrator — O!save</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="testi-slide">
            <div class="ts-stars">★★★★★</div>
            <p class="ts-text">"Kontrak maintenance server dengan Rizhani Technology Solution adalah investasi terbaik yang pernah kami lakukan. Sistem kami kini berjalan sangat stabil, downtime hampir nol, dan tim mereka benar-benar mengerti kebutuhan bisnis kami."</p>
            <div class="ts-author">
              <div class="ts-ava">DK</div>
              <div><strong>Dewi Kusuma</strong><span>Facility Manager — PT Djojo Negoro</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>

        <div class="testi-controls">
          <button class="tc-btn" id="prevSlide">‹</button>
          <div class="testi-dots" id="testiDots"></div>
          <button class="tc-btn" id="nextSlide">›</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       CONTACT
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <section id="contact">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-hd reveal">
        <div class="sh-tag">Contact Us</div>
        <h2>Hubungi <span class="text-grad">Kami</span></h2>
        <p>Konsultasi gratis, tanpa syarat. Kami siap membantu Anda!</p>
      </div>

      <div class="contact-grid">

        <!-- Info Column -->
        <div class="contact-info reveal">
          <div class="ci-item">
            <div class="ci-ico">📞</div>
            <div><strong>Telepon / WhatsApp</strong><a href="tel:+6281283099844">0812-8309-984</a></div>
          </div>
          <div class="ci-item">
            <div class="ci-ico">🌐</div>
            <div><strong>Website</strong><a href="https://www.rizhanitechnology.com" target="_blank">www.rizhanitechnology.com</a></div>
          </div>
          <div class="ci-item">
            <div class="ci-ico">📧</div>
            <div><strong>Email</strong><a href="mailto:info@rizhanitechnology.com">info@rizhanitechnology.com</a></div>
          </div>
          <div class="ci-item">
            <div class="ci-ico">📍</div>
            <div><strong>Lokasi</strong><span>Jl. Kusuma Timur II No. 14 RT 7 RW 17 Duren Jaya, Bekasi Timur, Kota Bekasi, Jawa Barat</span></div>
          </div>

          <a href="https://wa.me/628128309984" target="_blank" class="wa-big-btn">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="22" height="22"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
            Chat via WhatsApp
          </a>

          <div class="map-wrap">
            <iframe
              src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d126748.54!2d107.0005!3d-6.2349!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x2e698b5a86a49a81%3A0x5a0bc2472f890000!2sBekasi%2C%20Kota%20Bekasi%2C%20Jawa%20Barat!5e0!3m2!1sid!2sid!4v1700000000000"
              allowfullscreen loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"
              title="PT Rizhani Technology Solution — Bekasi Timur">
            </iframe>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Form Column -->
        <div class="contact-form reveal-right">
          <form id="contactForm" novalidate>
            <div class="fg">
              <label for="f-name">Nama Lengkap *</label>
              <input type="text" id="f-name" name="name" placeholder="Masukkan nama Anda">
              <span class="fe" id="e-name"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="fg-row">
              <div class="fg">
                <label for="f-email">Email *</label>
                <input type="email" id="f-email" name="email" placeholder="email@perusahaan.com">
                <span class="fe" id="e-email"></span>
              </div>
              <div class="fg">
                <label for="f-phone">No. Telepon *</label>
                <input type="tel" id="f-phone" name="phone" placeholder="08xxxxxxxxxx">
                <span class="fe" id="e-phone"></span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label for="f-company">Nama Perusahaan</label>
              <input type="text" id="f-company" name="company" placeholder="PT / CV / Nama Bisnis Anda">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label for="f-service">Layanan yang Dibutuhkan *</label>
              <select id="f-service" name="service">
                <option value="">Pilih layanan...</option>
                <option value="networking">Networking</option>
                <option value="security">Security System</option>
                <option value="maintenance">IT Maintenance</option>
                <option value="consulting">IT Consulting</option>
                <option value="other">Lainnya</option>
              </select>
              <span class="fe" id="e-service"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label for="f-msg">Pesan *</label>
              <textarea id="f-msg" name="message" rows="4" placeholder="Ceritakan kebutuhan IT Anda..."></textarea>
              <span class="fe" id="e-msg"></span>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" id="submitBtn">
              <span id="btnText">Kirim Pesan</span>
              <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 2L11 13M22 2l-7 20-4-9-9-4 20-7z"/></svg>
            </button>
            <div id="formOk" class="form-ok" style="display:none">
              ✅ Pesan berhasil terkirim! Kami akan menghubungi Anda segera.
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════
       FOOTER
  ══════════════════════════════ -->
  <footer id="footer">
    <div class="footer-top">
      <div class="container">
        <div class="footer-grid">

          <div class="ft-brand">
            <div class="ftb-logo">
              
              <img src="logos.png" alt="Rizhani" class="ft-logo" width="34" height="34">
              <div class="nb-text"><span class="nbt-main">RIZHANI</span><span class="nbt-sub">TECHNOLOGY SOLUTION</span></div>
            </div>
            <p>Solusi IT profesional terpercaya untuk bisnis Anda. Networking, Security, Maintenance & Consulting.</p>
            <div class="social-row">
              <a href="https://wa.me/628128309984" target="_blank" title="WhatsApp" class="sr-icon">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
              </a>
              <a href="https://www.rizhanitechnology.com" target="_blank" title="Website" class="sr-icon">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" height="16"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M2 12h20M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 010 20M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 000 20"/></svg>
              </a>
              <a href="mailto:info@rizhanitechnology.com" title="Email" class="sr-icon">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" height="16"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
              </a>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="ft-col">
            <h4>Navigasi</h4>
            <ul>
              <li><a href="#hero">Home</a></li>
              <li><a href="#about">About Us</a></li>
              <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
              <li><a href="#portfolio">Portfolio</a></li>
              <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="ft-col">
            <h4>Layanan</h4>
            <ul>
              <li><a href="#services">Networking</a></li>
              <li><a href="#services">Security System</a></li>
              <li><a href="#services">IT Maintenance</a></li>
              <li><a href="#services">IT Consulting</a></li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="ft-col">
            <h4>Kontak</h4>
            <div class="ft-contact-list">
              <div>📞 <a href="tel:+6281283099844">0812-8309-984</a></div>
              <div>🌐 <a href="https://www.rizhanitechnology.com" target="_blank">rizhanitechnology.com</a></div>
              <div>📧 <a href="mailto:info@rizhanitechnology.com">info@rizhanitechnology.com</a></div>
              <div>📍 Jl. Kusuma Timur II No. 14 RT 7 RW 17 Duren Jaya, Bekasi Timur, Kota Bekasi, Jawa Barat</div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <div class="container">
        <p>© 2025 PT Rizhani Technology Solution. All rights reserved.</p>
        <p>Powered by Innovation &amp; Dedication</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>

  <!-- FLOATING WA BUTTON -->
  <a href="https://wa.me/628128309984" target="_blank" class="float-wa" id="floatWA" title="Chat WhatsApp">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="26" height="26"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>

  <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
